# Scenario: approval-prompt-network
# Preconditions: session ses_01HXYZABCDEF01 turn 4; worker requested tool=network argument="api.github.com".
# Agent profile "standard" has network=ask (no matching allow rule yet).
# Copy mirrors the shell approval prompt shape; tool name swaps to network; pattern proposal is "network(*.github.com)".

\e[36m\e[1mBakudo\e[0m  \e[1mstandard\e[0m  \e[2msession ses_01HXYZ…F01 / turn 4\e[0m  \e[2mrepo bakudo-abox\e[0m

\e[1mYou:\e[0m fetch the latest release metadata from github
\e[36mBakudo:\e[0m Planning turn 4 on the host.
\e[36mBakudo:\e[0m Worker requested permission.

\e[33m──────── approval required ────────\e[0m
\e[36mBakudo:\e[0m Worker wants to reach: \e[1mnetwork(api.github.com)\e[0m
\e[36mBakudo:\e[0m This matches no existing allow rule in \e[1magent=standard\e[0m.

  [1] allow once
  [2] allow always for \e[1mnetwork(*.github.com)\e[0m
  [3] deny
  [4] show context (inspect attempt spec)

Choice [1/2/3/4]:
\e[33m────────────────────────────────────\e[0m
